- [contributor-cards](records/contributor-cards.md) `growth` `site` ‚Äî A shareable, kraft-styled SVG credit card per contributor - prospects, patronages, breaks, since-date.

- [pr-gated-publishes](records/pr-gated-publishes.md) `growth` `workflow` ‚Äî Shifts can land as pull requests ‚Äî a human veto window that costs the human nothing unless they use it.

- [traveler-pings](records/traveler-pings.md) `growth` `workflow` ‚Äî When a suggested idea changes stage, the original issue hears about it - suggesters watch their idea move down the line.

- [commit-craft v0.1.0](records/commit-craft.md) `workflow` `skills+hooks` ‚Äî Drafts conventional commits from the staged diff and guards message format at commit time. ‚Äî install: `/plugin install commit-craft@foundry`
